ticket.title: Set up Amazon Cognito auth (user pool, sign-up/login)
ticket.description: Stand up a Cognito user pool with email/password and hosted UI; CDK construct, JWT settings. Deploy is deferred to AI-76.

code_agent.rationale: Code needs the ticket acceptance and the AuthStack architecture. The release ship-note is out of scope, the superseded jobwinai.com domain note is stale, workspace conventions/policy are out of scope, Leo's private spike is local. The async PRD is in scope but only loosely relevant — optional.

qa_agent.rationale: QA also needs the ship-note; the stale domain note is withheld, workspace/project entries are out of scope, Leo's note is local.

design_agent.rationale: Design sees the ticket, conventions, security policy, and the PRD; codebase/release are out of scope, the stale domain note is withheld, Leo's note is local.

product_agent.rationale: Product sees ticket/release/workspace/project context; codebase is out of scope, the stale domain note is withheld, Leo's note is local.

human_teammate.rationale: Vicky sees every team entry including the stale domain note (flagged, not hidden); only Leo's local spike is invisible to her.
